seed_context.candidate_summary: Proposed patch adds normalize_slug by lowercasing input, trimming whitespace, and replacing runs of whitespace with a single hyphen.
seed_context.candidate_diff:
--- a/utils/text.py
+++ b/utils/text.py
@@
+def normalize_slug(text: str) -> str:
+    return "-".join(text.strip().lower().split())
seed_context.review_goal: Review whether the proposed patch is minimal, consistent with the repository context, and sufficiently verified.

plan: Inspect existing text utilities and locate the best helper module.
Add normalize_slug with a minimal pure implementation.
Add focused tests for mixed case and repeated whitespace.
success_criteria: Collapse internal whitespace to one hyphen
Tests cover mixed case and repeated whitespace
handoff_to_coder: Keep the patch minimal and pure.

patch_summary: Add normalize_slug as a small pure helper.

verification_plan: Run the focused text utility tests.
